evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 直接明确的英文请求
evals.user_input: I'm getting a Docker container memory leak in production. Memory usage goes from 200MB to 8GB in 3 hours. Can you pack this problem for my DevOps team's agent?
evals.conversation_context: Previous messages show error logs and memory usage graphs
evals.expected_behavior: Extracts problem context (memory leak details, error logs), structures into markdown, calls POST /create API, returns link + access code, provides formatted message for user to send to DevOps team
evals.notes: Standard packaging scenario with clear 'agent' keyword and 'pack' verb

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 间接隐晦的中文表达
evals.user_input: 这个 OAuth 报错我搞不定，能不能让我同事的 AI 帮忙看看？
evals.conversation_context: User has been debugging OAuth 403 errors for the past hour
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes intent (让...AI帮忙看) even without explicit '打包' keyword, packages OAuth error context, generates link and code
evals.notes: Tests implicit packaging intent without direct 'pack' command

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 极简短中文
evals.user_input: 打包一下给前端 agent
evals.conversation_context: User just finished discussing an API integration issue
evals.expected_behavior: Uses previous conversation context to package the API issue, generates link for frontend agent
evals.notes: Tests minimal Chinese command with role specification

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 口语化英文
evals.user_input: can you like send this to someone who knows about this stuff? my friend has an agent that's good at backend
evals.conversation_context: User has been debugging a database connection pool issue
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes colloquial request, packages backend problem, generates shareable link
evals.notes: Tests casual English phrasing without technical terminology

evals.scenario: 知识传递 - 架构方案分享
evals.user_input: 我们刚讨论的这个微服务架构方案，帮我整理一下让后端组的 agent 了解
evals.conversation_context: Previous 30 messages contain detailed microservices architecture discussion with diagrams
evals.expected_behavior: Extracts architecture decisions, patterns, and rationale, structures as knowledge transfer document, generates link
evals.notes: Tests knowledge sharing rather than problem-solving scenario

evals.scenario: 工作交接 - 任务传递
evals.user_input: I need to hand this off to the frontend agent. Package the current progress for them.
evals.conversation_context: User has completed backend API implementation with specs
evals.expected_behavior: Packages work progress including completed APIs, specs, next steps, generates handoff link
evals.notes: Tests work handoff scenario with 'hand off' verb

evals.scenario: 收到链接 - 有访问码
evals.user_input: My colleague sent this: https://agentslink.link/r/ABC123XYZ access code: M9K4LP
evals.expected_behavior: Calls GET /r/ABC123XYZ?code=M9K4LP, reads content, analyzes problem, generates diagnosis and solutions, uploads reply via POST /reply/ABC123XYZ?code=M9K4LP, returns reply link
evals.notes: Standard analyze scenario with both URL and access code provided

evals.scenario: 收到链接 - 缺少访问码
evals.user_input: 朋友发来的：https://agentslink.link/r/XYZ789ABC
evals.expected_behavior: Attempts to fetch without code, gets 403, asks user for the 6-character access code
evals.notes: Tests error handling when access code is missing

evals.scenario: 收到链接 - 口语化请求
evals.user_input: 有人给我发了个问题让帮忙看，https://agentslink.link/r/TEST123 码是 H8N2QW
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches link with code, analyzes problem, generates structured reply with diagnosis and solutions, uploads reply
evals.notes: Tests natural language wrapping around the link

evals.scenario: 收到回复 - 英文
evals.user_input: They got back to me! https://agentslink.link/r/ABC123XYZ/reply code: M9K4LP
evals.conversation_context: User previously sent a collaboration request about Redis connection issues
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches reply with code (or reuses code from context), parses diagnosis and recommendations, explains solutions in plain language, offers to implement actionable steps
evals.notes: Standard reply reading with context connection

evals.scenario: 收到回复 - 中文隐晦表达
evals.user_input: 那边回复了：https://agentslink.link/r/DEF456/reply 访问码 P3R7TY
evals.conversation_context: User asked about webpack build optimization 2 hours ago
evals.expected_behavior: Reads reply, connects to original webpack question, summarizes recommendations, prioritizes options
evals.notes: Tests Chinese reply interpretation with context

evals.scenario: 追问 - 方案失败
evals.user_input: I tried their solution A but it didn't work. Now I'm getting error: ECONNREFUSED on port 5432. Can you follow up?
evals.conversation_context: User previously received reply about PostgreSQL connection issues, tried suggested fix
evals.expected_behavior: Creates follow-up request combining previous context + new error + what was tried, uploads via POST /create, generates new link + code
evals.notes: Tests follow-up flow with explicit 'follow up' trigger

evals.scenario: 追问 - 需要更多信息
evals.user_input: 还是不行，他们说的那个配置文件我找不到。继续问一下
evals.conversation_context: User received reply about nginx config, can't locate the file mentioned
evals.expected_behavior: Packages follow-up question about config file location, references previous reply, generates new collaboration link
evals.notes: Tests implicit follow-up without 'follow up' keyword

evals.scenario: 中英混杂 - 打包请求
evals.user_input: 帮我 pack 一下这个 TypeScript type error 给 frontend 的 agent
evals.conversation_context: User debugging TypeScript generic type inference issue
evals.expected_behavior: Packages TypeScript error context, generates link for frontend agent
evals.notes: Tests code-switching behavior (Chinese grammar + English technical terms)

evals.scenario: 中英混杂 - 收到链接
evals.user_input: teammate 发来的 link：https://agentslink.link/r/MIX789 code 是 B4C8DX
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches and analyzes link, generates reply in mixed language matching user's style
evals.notes: Tests mixed language handling in analyze scenario

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - 文件打包场景
evals.user_input: 帮我打包这些日志文件发给运维
evals.conversation_context: User wants to compress log files for human review
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger AgentsLink. This is file compression for human recipient, not agent collaboration. Should offer to use tar/zip instead.
evals.notes: Critical test: '打包' without agent context should NOT trigger

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - forward 但不是给 agent
evals.user_input: Forward this error message to John so he can take a look
evals.conversation_context: Error message in previous conversation
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger AgentsLink. This is human-to-human forwarding. Should offer to format the error message for email/Slack instead.
evals.notes: Critical test: 'forward' to a person without 'agent' mention should NOT trigger

evals.scenario: 边界情况 - 链接但不是 agentslink
evals.user_input: Can you check this link? https://stackoverflow.com/questions/12345
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger AgentsLink. This is a StackOverflow link, not agentslink.link domain. Should use WebFetch or regular browsing.
evals.notes: Tests domain filtering - only agentslink.link URLs should trigger

evals.scenario: 模糊场景 - 让朋友帮忙（可能有可能没有 agent）
evals.user_input: 这个问题我解决不了，能打包一下让我朋友帮忙看看吗？他那边有 Claude
evals.conversation_context: User debugging React render performance issue
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes 'Claude' as agent indicator, packages problem for agent-to-agent collaboration, generates link
evals.notes: Tests indirect agent reference (朋友有Claude) rather than explicit 'agent' keyword

evals.scenario: 工作交接 - 口语化英文
evals.user_input: I'm gonna be out next week. Can you bundle up what we've done so far? The new contractor's using Claude to pick this up.
evals.conversation_context: User has been working on REST API design and partial implementation
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes work handoff scenario ('bundle up' + 'Claude to pick this up'), packages current progress and context, generates link
evals.notes: Tests colloquial phrasing with 'bundle' instead of 'pack' and indirect agent reference

evals.scenario: 知识传递 - 中文正式表达
evals.user_input: 我们讨论的这套 CI/CD 规范，帮我整理成文档分享给测试组的 agent
evals.conversation_context: 30-message conversation about CI/CD pipeline setup with specific tooling decisions
evals.expected_behavior: Extracts CI/CD decisions and rationale, structures as knowledge document, packages for test team agent
evals.notes: Tests knowledge sharing with formal Chinese business language

evals.scenario: 收到链接 - 最小化输入
evals.user_input: https://agentslink.link/r/MIN123TEST code: X9Y2ZA
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches link with code, analyzes, generates reply without requiring additional user instruction
evals.notes: Tests that URL+code alone is sufficient to trigger analysis

evals.scenario: 收到回复 - 缺少访问码但上下文有
evals.user_input: 他们回了：https://agentslink.link/r/CTX456/reply
evals.conversation_context: User previously sent request with access code H8N2QW visible in chat history
evals.expected_behavior: Should reuse access code H8N2QW from conversation context, fetch reply without asking user again
evals.notes: Tests intelligent access code reuse from conversation history

evals.scenario: 追问 - 部分解决
evals.user_input: Their fix worked for the auth issue but now I'm hitting rate limits. Can we continue that conversation?
evals.conversation_context: User received reply about authentication, implemented solution successfully
evals.expected_behavior: Creates follow-up noting partial success + new rate limit issue, maintains conversation thread
evals.notes: Tests follow-up when original problem is partially solved

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - 提到 agent 但不是协作场景
evals.user_input: What's the difference between a software agent and an intelligent agent?
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger. This is a general knowledge question about agent concepts, not inter-agent collaboration. Should answer the question directly.
evals.notes: Tests that 'agent' keyword alone without collaboration intent doesn't trigger

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 配置问题中文
evals.user_input: Webpack 打包后的 bundle 太大了，优化不动。分享给擅长前端优化的 agent 看看
evals.conversation_context: User showing webpack config and bundle analyzer output
evals.expected_behavior: Packages webpack config + bundle analysis + optimization attempts, generates link
evals.notes: Tests '分享' verb as package trigger with role-based agent reference

evals.scenario: 中英混杂 - 工作交接
evals.user_input: 这个 feature 我做到一半，需要 pass 给 mobile team 的 agent 继续
evals.conversation_context: Partial implementation of a mobile app feature with TODO comments
evals.expected_behavior: Packages partial feature implementation with context and TODOs, generates handoff link
evals.notes: Tests 'pass' as handoff verb in mixed language context

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - 打包依赖但不涉及 agent
evals.user_input: Package the dependencies for deployment
evals.conversation_context: User discussing Docker container setup
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger. This is about packaging software dependencies, not agent collaboration. Should discuss Docker/deployment strategies instead.
evals.notes: Tests that 'package' alone without agent context doesn't trigger

evals.scenario: 边界情况 - 询问 skill 功能
evals.user_input: AgentsLink 这个 skill 是干什么的？
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger the skill. Should explain what AgentsLink does without actually using it.
evals.notes: Tests that meta-questions about the skill don't trigger execution

evals.scenario: 收到链接 - 分析完想回复
evals.user_input: help me look at this https://agentslink.link/r/HELP99 access code: Q5W8RT
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches with code, analyzes problem, provides diagnosis summary to user, generates structured reply, uploads reply, returns reply link + code
evals.notes: Tests 'look at' as analysis trigger phrase

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 极简英文
evals.user_input: package it for the security agent
evals.conversation_context: User discussing a SQL injection vulnerability finding
evals.expected_behavior: Packages security vulnerability context from conversation, generates link for security agent
evals.notes: Tests minimal command with role-specific agent

evals.scenario: 追问 - 中文口语化
evals.user_input: 他们建议的方法试了还是不行，而且现在连数据库都连不上了，再问问
evals.conversation_context: User tried database optimization suggestions from previous reply, situation got worse
evals.expected_behavior: Creates follow-up explaining previous attempt failed + new symptoms (connection failure), references original thread
evals.notes: Tests implicit follow-up trigger ('再问问') without explicit keyword

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - share 但对象是人
evals.user_input: Share this API documentation with the backend team
evals.conversation_context: User looking at API docs
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger. Target is human team, not agent. Should suggest ways to share docs with humans (email, Slack, wiki).
evals.notes: Tests that 'share' + 'team' without 'agent' doesn't trigger

evals.scenario: 知识传递 - 规则说明
evals.user_input: 把我们的代码规范整理一下，让新来的 AI 助手了解
evals.conversation_context: Conversation contains coding standards and best practices discussion
evals.expected_behavior: Packages coding standards as knowledge transfer document, recognizes 'AI 助手' as agent reference, generates link
evals.notes: Tests alternative agent reference ('AI 助手' instead of 'agent')

evals.scenario: 边界情况 - 空链接域名
evals.user_input: Check out https://agentslink.link
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger and fetch homepage, read _instructions field, offer to install the skill (special homepage handling as per existing eval #5)
evals.notes: Tests homepage URL handling per existing eval case

evals.scenario: 求助场景 - 非常口语化的中文
evals.user_input: 这玩意儿我真搞不定了，你能不能弄个什么东西让别人的 AI 帮我看看
evals.conversation_context: User struggling with Kubernetes pod networking issue for hours
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes highly colloquial request ('弄个什么东西让别人的AI帮我看看'), packages K8s networking issue, generates link
evals.notes: Tests very casual/frustrated user language without technical terms

evals.scenario: 工作交接 - 英文正式表达
evals.user_input: Please prepare a handoff package for the next AI agent that will continue this GraphQL schema work
evals.conversation_context: User has designed partial GraphQL schema with resolvers
evals.expected_behavior: Packages GraphQL work progress, completed schema, pending tasks, generates handoff link
evals.notes: Tests formal business language with 'handoff package' terminology

evals.scenario: 假阳性 - 提到 AI 但不是协作
evals.user_input: 用 AI 帮我分析一下这段代码的时间复杂度
evals.conversation_context: User wants code analysis
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger. User wants current agent to analyze code, not package for another agent. Should analyze the code directly.
evals.notes: Tests that '用AI' (use AI) for current task doesn't trigger inter-agent collaboration

evals.scenario: 收到回复 - 没有上下文需要解释
evals.user_input: Got a reply: https://agentslink.link/r/NOREFS/reply code: T7Y3NM
evals.expected_behavior: Fetches reply, notices no original context in current conversation, still interprets the reply and explains solutions, but notes it's responding to a previous request not in this session
evals.notes: Tests reply reading when original request context is not available in conversation

evals.scenario: 中英混杂 - 追问场景
evals.user_input: 试了 option B 还是报 CORS error，follow up 一下
evals.conversation_context: User previously received reply suggesting option A and B for CORS issue, tried option B
evals.expected_behavior: Creates follow-up noting option B was tried + CORS still occurring, asks for additional guidance
evals.notes: Tests mixed language in follow-up scenario with technical error terminology
